chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-459 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.3025/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.3026/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 14.04.2026 Mr.Muhammad Imran Arain, Advocate for applicant ******* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Shafique Ahmed Rind son of Khuda Bux seeks protective bail in FIR No.03 of 2025-26 registered at P.S ASU Shaheed Benazirabad for offences under Sections 2 (s) and 157 of the Custom Act, 1969, punishable under clauses and of Section 156 r/w S.R 566 (I)/2005 dated 06.06.2025 S.R.O 499(I)/2009 dated 13.6.2009 as amended vide S.R.O 1619/(I)/2024 dated 03.10.2024. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; that the applicant being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, he apprehends that before reaching trial Court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail till 20.04.2026, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 20.04.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K.
The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
